Index.title: Your Personal AI Diet & Fitness Coach
Index.subtitle: Track your meals and exercises. Get fun, professional feedback. Build a sustainable routine.

CoachShowcase.title: Meet Your New Coaches
CoachShowcase.subtitle: Choose from a variety of AI personalities or create your own custom coach to guide your fitness journey.
CoachShowcase.coach1Desc: Tough love & high energy. Pushes you to your limits.
CoachShowcase.coach2Desc: Calm, mindful & focused on sustainable habits.
CoachShowcase.coachCustomDesc: You decide the personality, tone, and focus.

Features.title: More Than Just Tracking
Features.subtitle: Log your meals and workouts. Your AI coach analyzes them and provides immediate, actionable feedback.
Features.feature1Desc: Snap a photo of your meal or log text. Our advanced AI instantly calculates macros, and your personalized coach provides feedback to help you achieve your goals.
Features.feature2Desc: Chat with your coach anytime. Ask anything, get advice, and resolve all your questions with your personal AI guide.
Features.feature3Title: Complete Progress Tracking and AI suggestions
Features.feature3Desc: Monitor your weight, measurements, and nutrition goals. Get personalized AI suggestions to stay on track and optimize your diet.
Features.feature4Desc: Search for any food you want to log. BodyCoach's advanced AI model accurately and quickly finds the exact calories, carbs, protein, and fat for your meals.

SocialProof.title: Start Your Journey With BodyCoach
SocialProof.subtitle: See what our early adopters are saying about their new AI coaches.
SocialProof.review1: "Having a coach that responds instantly keeps me accountable. It's like having a personal trainer in my pocket!"
SocialProof.review2: "The feedback is surprisingly human and funny. Logging meals actually feels fun now."
SocialProof.review3: "Adjusting my diet based on my coach's feedback makes eating healthy feel effortless."
